name: ml-playbook
description: The ML Playbook — 12 rules and 4 skills that make Claude your senior ML engineer

scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const skills=['ml-bootstrap','ml-debug','ml-ship','llm-craft'];let ok=true;skills.forEach(s=>{const p='skills/'+s+'/SKILL.md';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('MISSING: '+p);ok=false;}else{const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.includes('name:')||!c.includes('description:')){console.error('INVALID FRONTMATTER: '+p);ok=false;}}});if(ok)console.log('All skills valid');else process.exit(1);"
